sentences.quote: We formalize the QCD chiral-symmetry-breaking pattern $\mathrm{SU}(N_f)_L \times \mathrm{SU}(N_f)_R \to \mathrm{SU}(N_f)_V$ and the associated Gell-Mann--Oakes--Renner relation~\cite{GMOR1968} in Lean~4.
sentences.quote_normalized: we formalize the qcd chiral-symmetry-breaking pattern $su(n_f)_l \times su(n_f)_r \to su(n_f)_v$ and the associated gell-mann--oakes--renner relation~ in lean~4.

sentences.quote: The quark condensate $\qbarq$ is encoded as a structure carrying its load-bearing sign constraint $\qbarq < 0$ as a structural invariant.
sentences.quote_normalized: the quark condensate $\qbarq$ is encoded as a structure carrying its load-bearing sign constraint $\qbarq < 0$ as a structural invariant.

sentences.quote: The chiral-broken phase then follows from the Gell-Mann--Oakes--Renner relation $\mpi^2 \fpi^2 = -2\,\mq\,\qbarq$ as a structural consequence: the left-hand side is strictly positive for non-vanishing pion mass and decay constant, the right-hand side is strictly positive when $\mq > 0$, so the equation forces $\qbarq < 0$.
sentences.quote_normalized: the chiral-broken phase then follows from the gell-mann--oakes--renner relation $\mpi^2 \fpi^2 = -2\,\mq\,\qbarq$ as a structural consequence: the left-hand side is strictly positive for non-vanishing pion mass and decay constant, the right-hand side is strictly positive when $\mq > 0$, so the equation forces $\qbarq < 0$.

sentences.quote: We pin the numerical agreement at PDG/FLAG central values ($\mpi = 0.137$ GeV, $\fpi = 0.092$ GeV, $\mq \approx 3.5$ MeV, $\qbarq \approx -0.0227$ GeV^3) to within $\sim 4 \times 10^{-8}$ GeV^4, shipped as a norm_num-backed theorem.
sentences.quote_normalized: we pin the numerical agreement at pdg/flag central values ($\mpi = 0.137$ gev, $\fpi = 0.092$ gev, $\mq \approx 3.5$ mev, $\qbarq \approx -0.0227$ gev^3) to within $\sim 4 \times 10^{-8}$ gev^4, shipped as a norm_num-backed theorem.

sentences.quote: A contrapositive theorem parametric over the raw scalar variable proves that the chiral-unbroken phase is inconsistent with the relation for positive quark mass and a non-trivial pion sector.
sentences.quote_normalized: a contrapositive theorem parametric over the raw scalar variable proves that the chiral-unbroken phase is inconsistent with the relation for positive quark mass and a non-trivial pion sector.

sentences.quote: The formalization ships $11$ substantive theorems, zero \texttt{sorry} statements, and zero new axioms.
sentences.quote_normalized: the formalization ships $11$ substantive theorems, zero sorry statements, and zero new axioms.
sentences.agent_notes: Re-scan 2026-04-27T23:30:00Z: Paper now uses macro from counts.tex (\chiralSsbThms{} = 10, \chiralSsbTests{} = 14) which auto-tracks live grep counts on ChiralSSB_QCD.lean. Drift resolved by macroization. Prior IA blocker auto-closed.

sentences.quote: The QCD quark condensate $\qbarq$ is the textbook order parameter for chiral-symmetry breaking, with the SU(N_f)_L x SU(N_f)_R -> SU(N_f)_V pattern producing the eight Goldstone bosons of QCD~\cite{NambuJonaLasinio1961}.
sentences.quote_normalized: the qcd quark condensate $\qbarq$ is the textbook order parameter for chiral-symmetry breaking, with the su(n_f)_l x su(n_f)_r -> su(n_f)_v pattern producing the eight goldstone bosons of qcd~.

sentences.quote: The Gell-Mann--Oakes--Renner relation~\cite{GMOR1968} $\mpi^2 \fpi^2 = -2\,\mq\,\qbarq$ ties the pion mass-decay-constant product to the bare quark mass and the condensate value.
sentences.quote_normalized: the gell-mann--oakes--renner relation~ $\mpi^2 \fpi^2 = -2\,\mq\,\qbarq$ ties the pion mass-decay-constant product to the bare quark mass and the condensate value.

sentences.quote: The negativity of $\qbarq$ is then a structural consequence of the equation: with $\mq > 0$ and the pion sector non-trivial, the left-hand side is strictly positive, so the right-hand side forces $\qbarq < 0$.
sentences.quote_normalized: the negativity of $\qbarq$ is then a structural consequence of the equation: with $\mq > 0$ and the pion sector non-trivial, the left-hand side is strictly positive, so the right-hand side forces $\qbarq < 0$.

sentences.quote: The Lean encoding is structure QuarkCondensate { sigma : R; sigma_neg : sigma < 0 } with sigma carrying units of GeV^3.
sentences.quote_normalized: the lean encoding is structure quarkcondensate { sigma : r; sigma_neg : sigma < 0 } with sigma carrying units of gev^3.

sentences.quote: A FLAG-2021 lattice-anchored~\cite{FLAG2021} witness ships as def flagLatticeValue : QuarkCondensate := <-0.0227, by norm_num>.
sentences.quote_normalized: a flag-2021 lattice-anchored~ witness ships as def flaglatticevalue : quarkcondensate := <-0.0227, by norm_num>.

sentences.quote: A predicate \texttt{IsQuarkCondensateCandidate} tests fractional-tolerance agreement with an observed lattice value: $|\sigma - \sigma_{\mathrm{obs}}| < \tau \cdot |\sigma_{\mathrm{obs}}|$.
sentences.quote_normalized: a predicate isquarkcondensatecandidate tests fractional-tolerance agreement with an observed lattice value: $|\sigma - \sigma_{obs}| < \tau \cdot |\sigma_{obs}|$.

sentences.quote: A falsifier theorem rules out $\sigma$ values too negative compared to the FLAG central, using \texttt{abs\_of\_neg} on $\sigma_{\mathrm{obs}} < 0$ to convert $|\sigma_{\mathrm{obs}}|$ to $-\sigma_{\mathrm{obs}}$.
sentences.quote_normalized: a falsifier theorem rules out $\sigma$ values too negative compared to the flag central, using abs\_of\_neg on $\sigma_{obs} < 0$ to convert $|\sigma_{obs}|$ to $-\sigma_{obs}$.

sentences.quote: The Gell-Mann--Oakes--Renner relation is encoded as a real-valued equation between two definitions: gmor_lhs := mπ^2 fπ^2; gmor_rhs := -2 m_q ⟨q̄q⟩.
sentences.quote_normalized: the gell-mann--oakes--renner relation is encoded as a real-valued equation between two definitions: gmor_lhs := mπ^2 fπ^2; gmor_rhs := -2 m_q ⟨q̄q⟩.

sentences.quote: The PDG/FLAG numerical agreement check ships as the theorem \texttt{gmor\_pdg\_match}: |gmor_lhs(0.137,0.092) - gmor_rhs(0.0035, -0.0227)| < 10^{-4}.
sentences.quote_normalized: the pdg/flag numerical agreement check ships as the theorem gmor\_pdg\_match: |gmor_lhs(0.137,0.092) - gmor_rhs(0.0035, -0.0227)| < 10^{-4}.

sentences.quote: The actual residual is $\sim 4 \times 10^{-8}~\mathrm{GeV}^4$, well within one part in $10^4$ of the central values.
sentences.quote_normalized: the actual residual is $\sim 4 \times 10^{-8}~gev^4$, well within one part in $10^4$ of the central values.

sentences.quote: A positivity theorem \texttt{gmor\_rhs\_pos\_of\_quark\_mass\_pos} ships as a structural auxiliary: the right-hand side $-2\,\mq\,\qbarq$ is positive whenever $\mq > 0$, via the structural negativity invariant.
sentences.quote_normalized: a positivity theorem gmor\_rhs\_pos\_of\_quark\_mass\_pos ships as a structural auxiliary: the right-hand side $-2\,\mq\,\qbarq$ is positive whenever $\mq > 0$, via the structural negativity invariant.

sentences.quote: The contrapositive theorem \texttt{chiral\_unbroken\_violates\_gmor} is parametric over a raw scalar variable $\sigma$ (not a structure-invariant lookup). Given mq>0, mπ≠0, fπ≠0, σ≥0, and the GMOR equation, the proof derives False via positivity composition.
sentences.quote_normalized: the contrapositive theorem chiral\_unbroken\_violates\_gmor is parametric over a raw scalar variable $\sigma$ (not a structure-invariant lookup). given mq>0, mπ≠0, fπ≠0, σ≥0, and the gmor equation, the proof derives false via positivity composition.

sentences.quote: Figure caption: Gell-Mann-Oakes-Renner relation at PDG/FLAG central values. Left: side-by-side bars at LHS ≈ 1.589e-4 GeV^4 and RHS ≈ 1.589e-4 GeV^4; visually indistinguishable; residual ~4e-8 GeV^4. Right: relative residual swept across PDG quark mass range; minimum at mq ≈ 3.5 MeV.
sentences.quote_normalized: figure caption: gell-mann-oakes-renner relation at pdg/flag central values. left: side-by-side bars at lhs ≈ 1.589e-4 gev^4 and rhs ≈ 1.589e-4 gev^4; visually indistinguishable; residual ~4e-8 gev^4. right: relative residual swept across pdg quark mass range; minimum at mq ≈ 3.5 mev.
sentences.agent_notes: Numerics confirmed: LHS=1.5886e-4, RHS=1.5890e-4, both ~1.589e-4. Figure file fig_gmor_relation_verification.png exists.

sentences.quote: We encode a structural assumption $H_{\mathrm{nat}}(t,q) : 0<t \wedge 0<q \wedge t/q \in [0.1, 10]$, asserting that the tetrad-VEV scale and the quark-condensate scale agree to within an order of magnitude.
sentences.quote_normalized: we encode a structural assumption $h_{nat}(t,q) : 0<t \wedge 0<q \wedge t/q \in [0.1, 10]$, asserting that the tetrad-vev scale and the quark-condensate scale agree to within an order of magnitude.

sentences.quote: This naturalness assumption is gated for numerical validation: the present formalization records its structure as a tracked hypothesis without committing to its truth.
sentences.quote_normalized: this naturalness assumption is gated for numerical validation: the present formalization records its structure as a tracked hypothesis without committing to its truth.

sentences.quote: The formalization includes a substantive cross-bridge to the project's Wetterich--Nambu--Jona-Lasinio scalar-channel module: \texttt{njl\_scalar\_bounded\_consistent\_with\_chiral\_broken} combines the upstream NJL scalar-channel bound with the structural negativity invariant of the quark condensate.
sentences.quote_normalized: the formalization includes a substantive cross-bridge to the project's wetterich--nambu--jona-lasinio scalar-channel module: njl\_scalar\_bounded\_consistent\_with\_chiral\_broken combines the upstream njl scalar-channel bound with the structural negativity invariant of the quark condensate.

sentences.quote: The Lean module \texttt{lean/SKEFTHawking/ChiralSSB\_QCD.lean} ships $11$ substantive theorems, zero \texttt{sorry} statements, and zero new axioms beyond the kernel's three.
sentences.quote_normalized: the lean module lean/skefthawking/chiralssb\_qcd.lean ships $11$ substantive theorems, zero sorry statements, and zero new axioms beyond the kernel's three.

sentences.quote: The Python mirror in \texttt{src/chiral\_ssb/} provides numerical evaluation of both sides of the Gell-Mann--Oakes--Renner relation across PDG ranges and a $14$-case \texttt{pytest} suite pinning the Lean theorems to numerical agreement.
sentences.quote_normalized: the python mirror in src/chiral\_ssb/ provides numerical evaluation of both sides of the gell-mann--oakes--renner relation across pdg ranges and a $14$-case pytest suite pinning the lean theorems to numerical agreement.
sentences.agent_notes: IA verified: 14 test methods in tests/test_chiral_ssb.py.

sentences.quote: The structural identification of the quark condensate as a chiral-symmetry-breaking order parameter, the Gell-Mann--Oakes--Renner relation as the structural consequence forcing its sign, and the PDG/FLAG numerical agreement at the central values pinned to one part in $10^4$ together provide a clean foundation for downstream chiral-symmetry-breaking analyses --- including the color-flavor-locked dense-quark-matter phase covered in a companion paper.
sentences.quote_normalized: the structural identification of the quark condensate as a chiral-symmetry-breaking order parameter, the gell-mann--oakes--renner relation as the structural consequence forcing its sign, and the pdg/flag numerical agreement at the central values pinned to one part in $10^4$ together provide a clean foundation for downstream chiral-symmetry-breaking analyses --- including the color-flavor-locked dense-quark-matter phase covered in a companion paper.
